endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureBridge.Admin/activations/{activationName}/products
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup. Replace {{ACTIVATIONNAME}} with a real activationname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureBridge.Admin/activations/{activationName}/products/{productName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup. Replace {{PRODUCTNAME}} with a real productname. Replace {{ACTIVATIONNAME}} with a real activationname.

endpoints.name: POST /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourcegroups/{resourceGroup}/providers/Microsoft.AzureBridge.Admin/activations/{activationName}/products/{productName}/download
endpoints.description: Downloads a product from azure marketplace.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUP}} with a real resourcegroup. Replace {{PRODUCTNAME}} with a real productname. Replace {{ACTIVATIONNAME}} with a real activationname.
